## Problem Description

Describe the problem or limitation you are experiencing. What is the use case that is not currently supported?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Be as specific as possible about the expected behavior, configuration options, or API changes.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they are insufficient.

## Additional Context

Add any other relevant information, references, or examples here.
